Florence District · Old Quarter

Crafted with passion.
Served with love.

Aurelia Café is a sunlit corner of the city where slow mornings stretch into golden afternoons. Single-origin espressos, still-warm pastries, and an open invitation to linger.

View menuReserve a table
Walk-ins always welcome

House Espresso

Dark chocolate · candied orange · toasted almond

Morning ritual

7:30 – 11:00

Our Story

A small, sunlit room
where the city
slows down.

Aurelia Café began as a sketch in the margin of a notebook—a place where the sound of steaming milk and clinking porcelain could soften the edges of the day. Founder and baker Elena Rossi imagined a room that felt more like a friend's apartment than a café: linen-draped tables, shelves of cookbooks, and light that moves slowly across the walls.

Our menu is guided by the markets and the seasons. We work with small roasters and nearby farms, milling flour on site and proofing dough overnight. Every plate is meant to feel composed but never fussy—simple ingredients treated with the attention you reserve for guests at your own table.

Mornings are for cappuccinos and barely cooled pastries. Afternoons shift into crisp salads, warm grains, and espresso over ice. By evening, the lights dim, candles appear, and Aurelia becomes a quiet hideaway for unhurried conversations and a final glass.

No Wi‑Fi on weekends · stay present

Elena's note

“We built Aurelia for the in‑between moments—after the meeting, before the train, somewhere to take a breath.”

Menu

A quiet balance of
comfort and brightness.

Spring · 2026

Breakfast

Slow mornings, warm plates, soft light.

Sample selection
◆
Aurelian Morning Plate
€18

Soft-scrambled eggs with chives, roasted cherry tomatoes, herbed potatoes, and country sourdough.

Best enjoyed with a flat white.

Lemon Ricotta Pancakes
€16

Three cloud-like pancakes with Amalfi lemon zest, vanilla, mascarpone, and honeyed citrus.

Herbed Avocado Tartine
€15

Smoked sea salt avocado, marinated cucumbers, soft herbs, and toasted seeds on seeded sourdough.

◆

Full menu available in the café

The menu at Aurelia shifts gently with the market: first strawberries, late‑summer figs, the last good tomatoes. We keep a small collection of dishes and pastries we know our guests love, and layer the rest in slowly.

Coffee is pulled on a two‑group Italian machine, calibrated each morning. Our bar team works with a rotating single origin alongside the house blend, adjusting the grind as the day warms.

Seasonal note

“Spring brings our favourite things: rhubarb tarts, elderflower tonics, and the first open windows.”

— Elena, Head Baker

Vegetarian & gluten‑friendly options always marked on the printed menu.

Three reasons our regulars keep a standing table.

The space

Warm wood, linen, and brass—designed to soften the day.

Reservations

Set the time.
We'll keep a table waiting.

Visual prototype · In a live build, requests would be confirmed by email.

We hold a number of tables each day for walk‑ins, especially during the softer hours of the afternoon. Reservations are recommended for brunch and for groups of four or more.

For private gatherings, we can reserve our long marble table by the window—perfect for a small celebration, editorial meeting, or launch breakfast with great coffee within reach.

Brunch

Sat–Sun · 9 – 13:00

Walk-ins

Always welcome

Private table

Up to 10 guests

Events

events@aureliacafe.com

Visit us

Tucked just off the main street, easy to find—hard to leave.

You'll find Aurelia on a quiet side street of the Florence District, a few doors down from the bookshop with the green awning. In the mornings, follow the scent of butter and espresso; in the evenings, look for the glow of candles in the front window.

We're a short walk from the river tram stop and easily reached by bicycle. There is limited street parking in the neighbourhood—if you can, we recommend arriving on foot and letting the pace of the city slow as you approach.

Dogs welcome on the terrace · children welcome at all hours

Address

17 Aurelia Lane
Old Quarter · Florence District

+39 (000) 417 23 89

  • Monday – Friday

  • Saturday
    8:00 – 21:00
  • Sunday
    8:00 – 21:00

Kitchen closes one hour before closing

17 Aurelia Lane

Florence District · Old Quarter · near the river tram stop and the bookshop with the green awning.

For designers & hosts

Imagine your brand
living in a space like this.

Aurelia Café is a fully art‑directed concept crafted to feel like real client work—warm, layered, and ready to adapt to restaurants, bakeries, wine bars, boutique hotels, and hospitality brands of all kinds.

Aurelia Café & Bakery

A quiet corner for slow mornings and unhurried conversations.

Crafted coffee, seasonal pastries, and a linen-and-wood interior inspired by sunlit European cafés.
